result.title: Calculation results
result.fallbackNotice: Programs marked with (∗) had no applications under this quota in 2025 — the calculation falls back to the general competition.
result.footer: 💡 Probability is calculated from historical passing scores and the quotas set by the Ministry of Science and Higher Education of Kazakhstan. Verify the data with the university admissions office.
result.thresholdNotice: {{count}} specialties hidden: your score is below the grant competition threshold (Ministry of Science: Pedagogy and Law — 75, Medicine — 70, Technical and Agriculture — 50).

info.title: How to use the calculator
info.desc: Fill in the form on the left — you will see every Kozybayev University specialty matching your profile subjects, with the probability of being awarded a state grant.

steps.title: Enter your UNT score
steps.desc: Provide the total score you received on the Unified National Testing. The maximum is 140 points.

steps.title: Pick the subjects
steps.desc: Pick the first profile subject, then the second. The system will offer only the allowed combinations.

steps.title: Choose your quota
steps.desc: Pick the category you are eligible for. The quota directly affects the passing threshold.

steps.title: Get the result
steps.desc: Press the button — the right side will show every specialty with its individual grant probability.

facts: 61 Kozybayev University specialties with active grants
Sigmoid model based on 2025 historical passing scores
AI chat helps you pick a specialty

chatHint.title: Need help choosing?
chatHint.text: Tap the chat button in the bottom-right corner — the AI assistant will walk you through the specialties and answer admission questions.

chat.greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm the Kozybayev University AI assistant. I can help you pick a specialty and figure out admissions. What would you like to know?
chat.name: AI assistant
chat.error: ❌ Connection error. Make sure the backend is running.
